case_title: SYLWESTER SLOJEWSKI VS. PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF SYLWESTER SLOJEWSKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ASHLEY BLACKBURN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE - CT CORPORATION SYSTEM] SERVED APR-15-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
